stemHtml: Regarding the Go-Around mode on an aircraft’s autopilot and autothrust system, which statement accurately describes its engagement criteria?

options.a: It will only engage if selected above the decision height.
options.b: It can engage above or below the decision height when selected.
options.c: It only engages once the aircraft is below the decision height and on an ILS approach.
options.d: It only engages when above the decision height and on an ILS approach.
